name: Gina
history: Worked overseas and built a website related to that work. Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and later abandoning projects when difficulties arise. Family-related difficulty involving his father; wrote a personal letter as part of a forgiveness process.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be strong and independent to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not constantly busy, I will become depressed.
coping_strategies: Keeps busy with activities to avoid depression and feelings of helplessness.
situation: Reflecting on past achievements alongside current challenges.
auto_thought: I can't let myself be vulnerable or I will be hurt again.
behavior: Avoids confrontation and maintains high activity levels to distract from emotional pain.
